transcript:
SOURCE: HubSpot meeting engagement (Fathom AI meeting summary), Discovery call held 2026-07-21 with Kristine Kukich of Jensen & McComas; Proposal Review meeting booked for Jacob Meissner (Closer) on 2026-08-04

Firm: Jensen & McComas
Website: Jensenmccomas.com
Contact: Kristine Kukich (building an AI-driven intake system for the firm, key stakeholder)
Phone: (971) 258-2417
Practice Areas: Corporate Law (avg. case value ~$85k over life of matter), Trusts & Estates (avg. case value ~$20k)
Firm profile: 16-month-old firm with 16 staff (6 attorneys, 3 paralegals), grew quickly by retaining partners' existing client relationships
Revenue: Currently ~$1.2M/year, at a growth plateau (the "Abyss" stage, roughly $1.2M-$2.2M revenue range); goal is to reach $3M within one year
Challenges selected on intake form: AI literacy and adoption; Converting right-fit leads into paying clients; Streamlining operations and efficiency; Generating consistent, high-quality leads

Key takeaways from discovery call:
- Growth Plateau: firm stalled at ~$1.2M revenue, goal is $3M in one year
- Systemic bottlenecks: almost no formal marketing (new business comes from partner outreach/conferences); leaky, manual intake process loses 6-8 leads per month, an estimated $250k+ monthly revenue impact based on a blended avg. case value of ~$50k
- Digital presence: Google Business Profile is unoptimized with zero reviews
- Team/operations: staff at max capacity (admins each support 2+ attorneys); firm needs 4-5 new hires (1 senior associate, 1 junior associate, 1+ other attorney, 2 admins)
- Strategic focus: build a scalable foundation (intake, hiring) before launching marketing, to avoid wasting ad spend and overwhelming staff
- SMB Team's proposed role: phased plan starting with foundational systems (intake, hiring), potentially including fractional COO/recruiting services

Next steps: Jacob to send meeting recap, case studies, profit/case calculator, and Law Firm Growth Accelerator info to Kristine, and prepare a tailored proposal focused on foundational systems before marketing. Proposal Review call scheduled for August 4, 2026, 10:00 AM Eastern / 7:00 AM Pacific.
